parameters.query:
SELECT id FROM users WHERE is_sales = true AND (
  (NULLIF($1, '') IS NOT NULL AND email = $1)
  OR (NULLIF($2, '') IS NOT NULL AND phone_number = $2)
  OR (NULLIF($3, '') IS NOT NULL AND identity_document = $3)
  OR (NULLIF($4, '') IS NOT NULL AND internal_id = $4)
) LIMIT 1

UPDATE users SET
  name              = CASE WHEN $2  <> '' THEN $2                    ELSE name              END,
  email             = CASE WHEN $3  <> '' THEN $3                    ELSE email             END,
  phone_number      = CASE WHEN $4  <> '' THEN $4                    ELSE phone_number      END,
  identity_document = CASE WHEN $5  <> '' THEN $5                    ELSE identity_document END,
  internal_id       = CASE WHEN $6  <> '' THEN $6                    ELSE internal_id       END,
  birthday          = CASE WHEN $7  <> '' THEN $7::date              ELSE birthday          END,
  address           = CASE WHEN $8  <> '' THEN $8                    ELSE address           END,
  alternative_phone = CASE WHEN $9  <> '' THEN $9                    ELSE alternative_phone END,
  notes             = CASE WHEN $10 <> '' THEN $10                   ELSE notes             END,
  rut               = CASE WHEN $11 <> '' THEN $11                   ELSE rut               END,
  bank_account      = CASE WHEN $12 <> '' THEN $12                   ELSE bank_account      END,
  is_active         = CASE WHEN $13 <> '' THEN $13::boolean          ELSE is_active         END,
  updated_at        = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO users (
  name, email, phone_number, identity_document, internal_id,
  birthday, address, alternative_phone, notes, rut, bank_account,
  is_active, is_sales
) VALUES (
  $1,
  NULLIF($2,  ''),
  NULLIF($3,  ''),
  NULLIF($4,  ''),
  NULLIF($5,  ''),
  NULLIF($6,  '')::date,
  NULLIF($7,  ''),
  NULLIF($8,  ''),
  NULLIF($9,  ''),
  NULLIF($10, ''),
  NULLIF($11, ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF($12, '')::boolean, true),
  true
)
RETURNING id

meta.notes:
CONFIGURACIÓN REQUERIDA:
1. Crear una credencial de tipo 'Postgres' en n8n con los datos de conexión a la DB.
2. En los nodos 'Buscar Paciente', 'Actualizar Paciente' e 'Insertar Paciente', seleccionar esa credencial (reemplaza POSTGRES_CREDENTIAL_ID).
3. Activar el workflow.

RUTA DEL WEBHOOK:
POST https://<tu-n8n>/webhook/system/data-import

PAYLOAD ESPERADO:
{ "entity": "patients", "records": [ { "name": "...", "email": "..." } ] }

ENTIDADES SOPORTADAS ACTUALMENTE:
- patients (tabla public.users con is_sales=true)
- Otras entidades retornan _status='skipped'

RESPUESTA:
{ "total": N, "inserted": N, "updated": N, "skipped": N, "errors": N, "error_details": [...] }
